Class Command

java.lang.Object
adris.altoclef.commandsystem.Command
Direct Known Subclasses:
CoordsCommand, CycleTestCommand, DepositCommand, DummyTaskCommand, EquipCommand, FollowCommand, FoodCommand, GamerCommand, GetCommand, GiveCommand, GotoCommand, HelpCommand, HeroCommand, IdleCommand, InventoryCommand, ListCommand, LocateStructureCommand, MarvionCommand, MeatCommand, PauseCommand, ReloadSettingsCommand, ScanCommand, SetGammaCommand, StashCommand, StatusCommand, StopCommand, TestCommand, UnPauseCommand
